name: black-hole
title: Black Hole
description: Schwarzschild black hole + accretion disc (Eric Bruneton beam-tracing shader, BSD-3-Clause). Ships TS + GLSL; copy public/black-hole/*.dat from kam-ui or rebuild with github.com/ebruneton/black_hole_shader. WebGL2 float extensions + Vite ?raw imports required.

files.content:

uniform vec3 camera_size;

layout(location = 0) in vec4 vertex;

out vec3 view_dir;

void main() {
  view_dir = vec3(vertex.xy * camera_size.xy, -camera_size.z);
  gl_Position = vertex;
}
